hero.subtitle: Tennis Club Kaiserstuhl
hero.title: BÖTZINGEN
hero.tagline: Since 1964 · The oldest tennis club at the Kaiserstuhl
about.label: About us
about.title: The oldest tennis club at the Kaiserstuhl
about.text: TCK was founded in 1964, making it the oldest tennis club at the Kaiserstuhl. With around 185 members — about 50 of whom are juniors — we offer tennis for every age and skill level, from beginners to advanced players. Our facility includes 6 clay courts, our own 2-court indoor hall, a practice wall, a boules pitch and a clubhouse with a sun terrace.
offer.label: What we offer
offer.title: Everything for your tennis game
offer.hall.title: Tennis Hall
offer.hall.desc: 2-court hall with carpet and granulate. Online booking 24/7. Season from October to April. Light and heating included.
offer.teams.title: Teams
offer.teams.desc: 17 teams in summer, 6 in winter — from U9 juniors to men's/women's 60. We compete in the Baden Tennis Association championships.
offer.training.title: Training
offer.training.desc: Qualified coaching by licensed DTB trainers from Tennis-Welt Süd, led by Luiz Weller. Junior, team and individual lessons.
offer.clubhouse.title: Clubhouse
offer.clubhouse.desc: Cosy clubhouse with sun terrace and view of the courts. Also available for private events. Drinks and catering on site.
offer.booking.title: Online Booking
offer.booking.desc: Book all courts conveniently from home — outdoor and indoor. Payment by direct debit or credit account via our eBuSy booking system.
offer.fanshop.title: Fan Shop
offer.fanshop.desc: Show your club spirit! High-quality fan articles from a single piece via our partner Clubstylez. Part of the revenue goes to TCK.
events.label: Events
events.title: Upcoming Events
events.archive.label: Archive
events.archive.title: Past Events
cta.title: Become a Member
cta.text: Join the oldest tennis club at the Kaiserstuhl! Whether beginner or advanced, young or old — we warmly welcome all tennis friends. Enjoy 6 clay courts, our own indoor hall, qualified coaching and a lively club community.
verein.history.label: History
verein.history.title: Since 1964 at the Kaiserstuhl
verein.board.label: Board
verein.board.title: Board & Contacts
verein.trainers.label: Coaching team
verein.trainers.title: Our coaching team
verein.trainers.text: Training for our young players has been provided for many years by Tennis-Welt Süd under the direction of Luiz Weller. Well-trained coaches with the appropriate licences from the German Tennis Federation guarantee high-quality coaching.
verein.teams.label: Teams
verein.teams.title: Our Teams
verein.teams.text: Every year, several teams in different age groups participate in the team championships of the Baden Tennis Association. Competitive play features junior, women's, men's, senior and mixed teams.
verein.intro.label: About us
verein.intro.title: The oldest tennis club at the Kaiserstuhl
verein.intro.text: TCK was founded in 1964. With around 185 members — about 50 of whom are juniors — we offer tennis for every age and skill level. Our facility includes 6 clay courts, a 2-court indoor hall, a practice wall, a boules pitch and a clubhouse with a sun terrace.
verein.tennishalle.text: Our 2-court hall with carpet and granulate offers ideal playing conditions from October to April. Light and heating included. The hall is open to members and guests.
verein.mitgliedschaft.aktiv.title: Active Membership
verein.mitgliedschaft.passiv.title: Passive Membership
verein.mitgliedschaft.passiv.li1: Play 6× per year on outdoor courts
verein.mitgliedschaft.fees.title: Annual Fees
verein.mitgliedschaft.note: Joining after 30.06. — reduced base fee. Full fee schedule under Downloads.
verein.mannschaften.text: Every year, several teams in various age groups compete in the championships of the Baden Tennis Association — from U9 juniors to men's/women's 60.
verein.mannschaften.training.title: Training times
verein.training.label: Club coach
verein.training.intro: Training has been provided for many years by Tennis-Welt Süd under the direction of Luiz Weller. Well-trained coaches with DTB licences guarantee qualified training for all age groups.
verein.training.angebote.label: Offers:
verein.training.angebote: Junior training, team training, individual lessons, group training, intensive camps
verein.downloads.intro: Here you'll find all important TCK Bötzingen documents to download.
hall.info.label: Information
hall.info.title: Play all year round
hall.info.text: TCK Bötzingen has a 2-court indoor tennis hall with carpet surface and embedded granulate. The hall can be used by both members and external players and guests. Hall season: first week of October to last week of April.
hall.prices.label: Prices
hall.prices.title: Hall Prices
hall.prices.subtitle: Lighting and heating are included in all prices. Prices valid from 1 October 2023.
hall.discount.label: Discounts
hall.discount.title: Discounts
hall.discount.summer.text: During the summer season (1 May to 30 September) you receive a 50% discount on individual lessons and subscriptions.
hall.discount.youth.text: Young people under 18 receive a 50% discount on all hall prices year-round.
hall.booking.label: Booking
hall.booking.title: Hall Booking
hall.booking.text: Court bookings are made through our online booking system. Payment by direct debit or credit account. For a permanent key, write to info@tck-boetzingen.de.
membership.fees.label: Fees
membership.fees.title: Annual Fees
membership.fees.subtitle: Extract from the fee schedule. The complete fee schedule can be found under Downloads.
membership.hours.label: Volunteer hours
membership.hours.title: Volunteer hours
membership.hours.text: From the age of 18, a total of 12 volunteer hours must be completed for the club in the following year (until the age of 70). Family memberships require 24 hours total. €10 compensation per unfulfilled hour.
membership.comparison.label: Comparison
membership.comparison.title: Active vs. Passive
membership.faq.label: FAQ
membership.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
membership.downloads.label: Downloads
membership.downloads.title: Documents & Forms
membership.downloads.text: Here you will find all important documents related to the club.
membership.service.label: Service
membership.service.title: Member Service
membership.service.text: Here you can submit various changes regarding your membership directly and easily.
contact.form.label: Contact
contact.form.title: Write to us
contact.form.text: If you have questions, need information or would like to tell us something, we look forward to your message! We will reply as soon as possible.
contact.form.name: Name
contact.form.privacy: I have read and agree to the privacy policy.
contact.map.label: Directions
contact.map.title: How to find us
contact.access.label: Access authorisation
contact.access.title: Apply for access authorisation
contact.access.text: To access our facility, the tennis hall and the clubhouse, you need an access authorisation in the form of an RFID key. Deposit: €35.
contact.access.intro: To access the facility, tennis hall and clubhouse you need an RFID key (deposit: €35).
contact.info.label: Contact details
contact.info.title: Our contact details
contact.cta.label: Become a member
contact.cta.title: Download membership application
contact.cta.text: Fill it in, sign it and send it to us — by post, email or in person. We look forward to welcoming you!
contact.success.title: Thank you!
contact.success.text: Your message has been sent. We will get back to you shortly.
contact.vorstand.label: Contacts
